Title: [EPIC-A] Map Command Center
Body:
Goal: Make the map the operational command interface for all zones and assets.

Scope:
- Zone boundaries and labels
- Asset and operational layers
- Risk overlays
- Zone command drawer

Acceptance:
- All zones visible with boundaries and names
- Layer toggles update without reload
- Zone drawer opens with live metrics

Title: [EPIC-B] Action Execution Framework
Body:
Goal: Convert insights into immediate, traceable actions.

Scope:
- Task actions (create/start/complete/cancel)
- Alert actions (resolve/escalate/request evidence)
- Daily check and navigation actions

Acceptance:
- All actions persist with actor and timestamp
- Errors are surfaced clearly

Title: [EPIC-C] Proactive Question Engine
Body:
Goal: Automatically ask high-value questions when critical data is missing.

Scope:
- Trigger rules
- Queue lifecycle
- Role-based response UX

Acceptance:
- Correct lifecycle transitions
- Idempotent trigger behavior

Title: [EPIC-D] Recommendation Engine v1
Body:
Goal: Generate explainable, ranked recommendations with immediate actions.

Scope:
- Category-based generation
- Ranking and expiry
- Action lifecycle tracking

Acceptance:
- Recommendations include rationale/confidence/impact
- Actions update status and audit trail

Title: [EPIC-E] Learning and Adaptation Loop
Body:
Goal: Improve recommendation quality over time from outcomes and operator behavior.

Scope:
- Outcome tracking windows (1/7/30/90)
- Adaptive weighting
- Prompt suppression for low-value repetition

Acceptance:
- Recommendation ordering improves using feedback

Title: [EPIC-F] External Signal Integration
Body:
Goal: Integrate weather and market signals into proactive planning.

Scope:
- Weather ingestion and triggers
- Market ingestion and pricing-aware recommendations
- Degraded mode on outage

Acceptance:
- Valid recommendations generated from external events

Title: [EPIC-G] Geospatial Data Completion
Body:
Goal: Close map data gaps for operational precision.

Scope:
- Plot 12 precision validation
- Water point mapping
- Gate mapping
- Fence segment digitization

Acceptance:
- Critical geospatial gaps reduced to zero

Title: [EPIC-H] Security, Observability, and Readiness
Body:
Goal: Ensure production-safe behavior and diagnosability.

Scope:
- RLS validation
- telemetry and monitoring
- release hardening

Acceptance:
- No open P0 auth/data integrity defects

Title: [STORY-A1] Render inferred zone polygons
Body:
Parent: EPIC-A

Implement:
- Render all inferred and mapped zone polygons
- Show zone labels and type icons

Acceptance:
- All zones visible and selectable

Title: [STORY-A2] Add satellite/street base map toggle

Parent: EPIC-A

Implement map style switcher with persisted preference.

Acceptance:
- Toggle updates map instantly
- Preference restored on app relaunch

Title: [STORY-A4] Add pan/scroll gesture toggle
Body:

Acceptance:

- State persists across restarts

Title: [STORY-A5] Build layer toggle panel scaffold
Body:
Parent: EPIC-A

Implement UI for toggling asset/operational layers.

Acceptance:

- No full-screen reload needed

Title: [STORY-A6] Open zone command drawer on zone tap
Body:
Parent: EPIC-A

Implement tap-to-open drawer with zone identity and baseline metadata.

Acceptance:
- Drawer opens under 300ms
- Correct zone selected

Body:
Parent: EPIC-B

Title: [STORY-B2] Start/complete/cancel task actions

Acceptance:

Parent: EPIC-B

Title: [STORY-B4] Add open-in-maps navigation

Title: [STORY-B6] Add action confirmation and error UX
Body:
Parent: EPIC-B

Standardize confirmations and error surfacing for all immediate actions.

Acceptance:

Title: [STORY-C1] Trigger missing-check questions
Body:
Parent: EPIC-C

Acceptance:

Title: [STORY-C2] Trigger livestock mismatch questions
Body:
Parent: EPIC-C

Create question when count mismatch exceeds threshold.

Title: [STORY-C3] Build role-based question inbox
Body:
Parent: EPIC-C

Manager sees all relevant; staff sees assigned.

Title: [STORY-C4] Add typed response submission flow
Body:
Parent: EPIC-C

Support yes/no, numeric, text, choice, evidence request response types.

Title: [STORY-D1] Generate category-based recommendations
Body:
Parent: EPIC-D

Acceptance:

Title: [STORY-D2] Implement ranking and expiry logic
Body:
Parent: EPIC-D

Implement confidence*impact*urgency/effort ranking and expiry pruning.

Acceptance:
- Sorted recommendations and stale suppression

Title: [STORY-D3] Build recommendation cards with explainability
Body:
Parent: EPIC-D

Display why now, triggering data points, and expected effect.

Acceptance:
- Explainability visible on all recommendation cards

Title: [STORY-D4] Implement recommendation action lifecycle
Body:
Parent: EPIC-D

Add accept/modify/defer/reject/execute with audit logs.

Acceptance:
- Action updates status and inserts action trail

Title: [STORY-E1] Capture 1/7/30/90-day outcomes
Body:
Parent: EPIC-E

Implement outcome records for executed recommendations.

Acceptance:

Title: [STORY-E2] Adaptive weighting from outcomes
Body:
Parent: EPIC-E

Adjust recommendation confidence/priority using historical outcomes.

Acceptance:
- Weight changes affect future ordering

Title: [STORY-E3] Suppress repetitive low-value prompts
Body:
Parent: EPIC-E

Detect repetition patterns and reduce nuisance prompts.

Acceptance:
- Repeat low-value prompt rate declines

Title: [STORY-F1] Integrate weather feed and weather triggers
Body:
Parent: EPIC-F

Ingest weather and generate weather-risk recommendations.

Acceptance:

Title: [STORY-F2] Integrate market feed and market triggers
Body:
Parent: EPIC-F

Ingest market price signals and generate harvest timing guidance.

Title: [STORY-F3] Implement external feed degraded mode

Title: [STORY-G1] Validate Plot 12 precision boundary
Body:
Parent: EPIC-G

Complete precision verification and update geometry if needed.

Title: [STORY-G2] Map and geocode water points

Title: [STORY-G3] Map gate points and access status

Title: [STORY-G4] Digitize fence segments

Parent: EPIC-G

Title: [STORY-H1] Run manager/staff RLS negative and positive QA

Parent: EPIC-H

Execute role-based QA scripts and record evidence.

Title: [STORY-H2] Add trigger/recommendation telemetry dashboards
Body:
Parent: EPIC-H

Title: [STORY-H3] Performance and crash hardening
Body:
Parent: EPIC-H

Profile map/drawer/render performance and fix bottlenecks.

Title: [STORY-H4] Release gate checklist execution
Body:
Parent: EPIC-H

Execute release gate checklist and sign-off report.

Acceptance:
